# DocPhils Portfolio

DocPhils is a fullstack developer portfolio focused on Laravel, Livewire, MERN, EdTech systems, and performance-first product engineering.

## Primary URLs
- https://docphils.mephed.ng/
- https://docphils.mephed.ng/projects
- https://docphils.mephed.ng/sitemap.xml

## Scope
- Public marketing pages
- Published projects
- Published case studies

## Contact
- Use the contact form on the homepage: https://docphils.mephed.ng/#contact
